trending_videos.title: Pokémon Champions – Overview Trailer – Nintendo Switch
trending_videos.description:
The Pokémon Champions game launches April 8, 2026 on the Nintendo Switch system. https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/pokemon-champions-switch/

Pokémon battles for everyone! Recruit Pokémon in-game or transfer them from Pokémon HOME, then gear up for thrilling battles with Trainers near and far! Compete in three different modes of Pokémon battles: Ranked Battles, Casual Battles, and Private Battles. You can challenge these modes in both Single Battle and Double Battle formats. Plus, use in-game Victory Points (VP) you’ve earned to improve a Pokémon’s stats, acquire new looks for your Trainer, and more!

The game is also compatible with the Nintendo Switch 2 system. 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

Follow Nintendo of America
X/Twitter: https://twitter.com/NintendoAmerica
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NintendoAmerica
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nintendoamerica
Twitch: https://www.

trending_videos.title: FOX and Friends
trending_videos.description: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

trending_videos.title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
trending_videos.description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

trending_videos.title: Second Round: Iowa vs. Florida
trending_videos.description: Iowa faces Florida in the South Region second round at Benchmark International Arena. After a hard-fought battle with the Tigers, Iowa meets the Gators. Florida beat Prairie View 114-55 to qualify. Both teams aim for the tournament's next round.

trending_videos.title: Dutton Ranch | Official Teaser | Paramount+
trending_videos.description:
Rip Wheeler and Beth Dutton gamble everything on a new life in South Texas, but the promise of building a future far from the ghosts of Yellowstone quickly collides with brutal new realities and a rival ranch that will stop at nothing to protect its empire.

Dutton Ranch. Streaming May 15. Only on Paramount+.

trending_videos.title: Second Round: UCLA vs. UConn
trending_videos.description: The East Region round two gets underway as UCLA takes on UConn at Xfinity Mobile Arena. The Bruins beat the Knights 75-71 to qualify, while the Huskies beat Furman 82-71. Both teams look to qualify for the next round in this high-stakes matchup.

trending_videos.title: JUJUTSU KAISEN Sendai Colony | Official Trailer | Crunchyroll
trending_videos.description:
Watch JUJUTSU KAISEN on Crunchyroll! http://got.cr/cc-jjkpv

ABOUT JUJUTSU KAISEN
Yuji Itadori is a boy with tremendous physical strength, though he lives a completely ordinary high school life. One day, to save a classmate who has been attacked by curses, he eats the finger of Ryomen Sukuna, taking the curse into his own soul. From then on, he shares one body with Ryomen Sukuna. Guided by the most powerful of sorcerers, Satoru Gojo, Itadori is admitted to Tokyo Jujutsu High School, an organization that fights the curses... and thus begins the heroic tale of a boy who became a curse to exorcise a curse, a life from which he could never turn back.

ABOUT CRUNCHYROLL
Crunchyroll is the place to watch all your favorite anime! Stream new anime, full episodes, movies, OVAs, music, openings, endings, trailers and all the best moments in anime, subbed and dubbed!

▶ WATCH FULL ANIME EPISODES ON YOUTUBE: https://got.cr/cc-pt

🔶 GET YOUR FREE 7-DAY CRUNCHYROLL TRIAL: https://got.cr/cc-7dayspv

trending_videos.title: Second Round: USC vs. South Carolina
trending_videos.description: This Regional 4 Sacramento second round battle highlights the USC Trojans and South Carolina Gamecocks at Colonial Life Arena. USC advanced by narrowly beating CLEM 71-67 OT, while South Carolina dominated SOU 103-34. Both teams want to advance.

trending_videos.title: TINY TAKEOVER | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Ready or not, here comes the Tiny Takeover drop! New versions of baby mobs have
stormed Minecraft, causing cuteness overload across biomes and builds. Listen out for
heart-melting sounds, craft name tags for your pets, and keep babies forever young with the
golden dandelion. The babies are officially on the loose, so get ready to collect, coo over,
and create chaos with these tiny rascals!

trending_videos.title: Second Round: Illinois vs. Vanderbilt
trending_videos.description: This Regional 1 Fort Worth second round clash brings the Illinois Fighting Illini and Vanderbilt Commodores inside Memorial Gymnasium. Illinois fought to defeat COLO 66-57, and Vanderbilt routed HPU 102-61. Both teams desperately want to win.

diversity_in_content.description: The trending videos encompass a wide range of content, including trailers, sports, news, and anime.
insights: Trailers and teasers account for 40% of the trending videos, indicating strong viewer interest in upcoming media releases.
Sports content, particularly college basketball, represents 40% of the videos, suggesting high engagement during tournament periods.
News content appears in the list with notable presence through a major channel, FOX News.

channel_influence.description: Influential channels with significant followings tend to have their content trending.
insights: Major entertainment and news channels like Nintendo of America, Disney, and FOX News have a high likelihood of their content trending, demonstrating the power of established brands.
Each top channel has only one video trending, showing that diverse content from different categories can trend simultaneously.

engagement_strategies.description: Successful engagement strategies observed in the trending videos.
insights: Leveraging popular franchises (e.g., Pokémon, Moana, JUJUTSU KAISEN) can significantly boost viewership.
Releasing content tied to current events or seasonal interests (e.g., sports tournaments, movie releases) is effective in capturing audience attention.

potential_growth_areas.description: Identifying areas with growth potential based on current trends.
insights: There is an opportunity to create content around upcoming events or releases, given the high engagement seen in trailers and sports.
Channels that can leverage multiple popular franchises or current events might increase their chances of trending.

category_expansion.description: Opportunities to expand into less represented categories among trending content.
insights: While sports and entertainment trailers are well-represented, other categories like educational content or tech reviews might be underrepresented, presenting a growth opportunity.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
